title: baileya pleniradiata
intro: Baileya pleniradiata, also known as the pleniradiata daisy or pleniradiata desert marigold, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Baileya pleniradiata include its potential to treat wounds, skin irritations, and other minor injuries, as well as its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Baileya pleniradiata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
